contracts.continue: Activate the existing marked WezTerm frontend when present; otherwise create dev only when absent and launch one frontend attached to dev. Never allocate a numbered session.
contracts.new: Allocate the smallest unused dev-N session and launch exactly one separate WezTerm frontend. Never attach to dev or an existing dev-N session.

proofCeiling: Static contract, deterministic plan, installer receipt, and launch command acknowledgement. Visible window behavior and operator acceptance require workstation runtime proof.
